title: Monoc
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Monoc''' was a derogatory term used to describe cyclopean [[Species/Legends|species]] such as [[Abyssin/Legends|Abyssins]]. Abyssin [[Myo/Legends|Myo]] disliked being called a ''monoc''.

The [[Kajain'sa'Nikto/Legends|Nikto]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Nim Abek]] owned a [[Cantina|bar]] named [[The Thirsty Monoc]] on level 3 of [[Abek's Station]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-12-XX -->{{CCG|set=Premiere Limited|cardname=Myo}}
*<!-- 1997-07-XX -->''[[Secrets of the Sisar Run]]''
